message:
test(fcp-core): pin ZoneKeyError 5-variant Display + From<CryptoError> source chain (flywheel_connectors-jcxq8)

Bead asks for ZoneJoinError variant Display + serde tag pinning. No
type literally named ZoneJoinError exists in fcp-core. The closest
zone-join-related error enum is ZoneKeyError at zone_keys.rs:369 — a
5-variant error returned by zone-key wrap/unwrap operations. Wrapping/
unwrapping a zone key IS the technical mechanism by which a node joins
a zone (HPKE seal/open of the symmetric zone key); failures during
that flow are the "ZoneJoinError" surface.

No prior test pins ZoneKeyError — grep returns empty.

Coverage: 5 variants Display verbatim with payload preservation
(InvalidKeyLength expected/found, ZoneIdMismatch expected/found,
MissingWrappedZoneKey/MissingWrappedObjectIdKey node_id tokens,
Crypto inner-CryptoError forward). Crypto variant prefixes with
"crypto failure: " and forwards the inner CryptoError Display
verbatim. From<CryptoError> conversion sentinel (#[from] source
preservation). Source chain: Crypto variant exposes std::error::Error
::source() returning the inner CryptoError; the 4 leaf variants do
NOT expose source() (pin so a future change that drops the chain
forwarding is caught — anyhow/eyre walk source). Distinct-Display
sentinel across all 5 variants. Payload-preservation sentinels for
InvalidKeyLength + ZoneIdMismatch (Display includes the actual
numeric/string fields). Loud "MissingWrappedZoneKey vs
MissingWrappedObjectIdKey distinct phrasing" sentinel — the two
syntactically-similar variants must NOT collapse.

13 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-jcxq8 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test zone_join_error_variant_display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
